title: ΔHL Vision // Minecraft Beta
description: A modpack shaped by my own vision of how the game could be, revisiting the Beta experience, but with personal and deliberate gameplay choices.
body:
### Disclaimer: (⚠) This Minecraft modpack is subject to continuous development and experimentation. Make regular backups of your Minecraft worlds.
### Description: A tribute to the nostalgia and charm of Minecraft's golden age, with certain modern additions and enhancements to enhance the overall experience. Inspired by [Old School Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/old-school-minecraft), [Legacy Console Experience](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy_console_experience) and [Disckord's Minecraft](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LufV13weSW8).
### Recommended additions: [Golden Days](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days) ([Base](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days/releases/tag/1.8.2)) or [Beta Continuum](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beta-continuum/) resource pack.
### Modlist (+ license and usage permission)
Here

### Roadmap: \+ Prevent new mobs from spawning. ("You Shall Not Spawn!" and "Mobfilter" don't work 100% as intended. I need to write my own mod.) --- \+ Make it so monsters give bad status to the players, like in the Epic Siege mod, such as fatigue, but just if far away from spawn. \+ More blocks, like the "Chisel" mod? \+ Random enchantments and curses when you craft an item.
